author: Rajesh Kumar
comment: The smart switchboards completely changed how we manage our home energy consumption. App integration is incredibly fast!

author: Priya Sharma
comment: Installed the SV-PTZ 8K camera in our warehouse. The zoom capability and night vision clarity are absolutely phenomenal. Security team loves it.

author: Amit Patel
comment: Being a NeedyZone distributor has been great for our business. Support is always on time, and build quality of switchboards is stellar.

author: Vikram Singh
comment: Super clean wiring layouts on these panels. Extremely installer-friendly, and the client onboarding takes less than five minutes.
